name: The chosen one's mentor resides here
description:
%PERSON_NAME arrives in the %LOCATION_NAME, where the Chosen One's reclusive and mysterious Mentor resides. After some time, %he finds an unremarkable home lived in by a seemingly unremarkable person. Though enjoying the comfort of anonymity amongst the commoners, deep down the elder knows there may come a day that a visitor will come bearing malice.

Is today that day?

choices.name: Death comes knocking
choices.description: Death of the Mentor will cost the Chosen One 9 Sanity and will Disrupt them for 5 Turns. After the murder, when they arrive at this location, there's a high chance the Chosen One will figure out %PERSON_NAME committed the murder and will then gain a Hatred towards %him.

choices.name: Spared, for now
choices.description: Nothing happens. The Challenge 'Kill the Chosen One's Mentor' has appeared in the %LOCATION_NAME, for when you might change your mind about this mercy...

effects.argument: Chosen One Mentor;fog.mentor_icon.png;Move an agent into this location to trigger this event again, and have the option to kill the mentor, harming the Chosen One;TO_MAX_CHARGE
